channel.title: morningNewsLastSection
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsLastSection, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Children's books to talk about school shootings with kids
item.description: Books help adults start difficult conversations on a tough topic.

item.title: 8 Ways to Get the Protein You Need
Let your zodiac sign pick your 2026 romance read
item.description: Let the stars guide your next romance novel.

item.title: Fae-bulous BIPOC and queer romantasies
item.description: Diverse romantasies with magical heists and mythology-inspired systems.
